auth.label: API Key
auth.description: AeroLeads API key sent as the api_key query parameter for LinkedIn and email lookup APIs. Find it in AeroLeads Settings under API Key after signing in: https://aeroleads.com/users/settings#api_key.

actions.name: get_details_from_linkedin_url
actions.description: Retrieve prospect details, emails, phone numbers, company, education, skills, and related profile data from a public LinkedIn profile URL using AeroLeads.

linkedin_url.description: Public LinkedIn profile URL for the prospect, such as https://www.linkedin.com/in/example.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for retrieving prospect details from a LinkedIn profile URL.

data.description: The raw LinkedIn profile enrichment details returned by AeroLeads, including prospect, email, phone, company, education, experience, skill, and social fields when available.

successful.description: Whether AeroLeads returned a successful enrichment result.

message.description: A status or error message returned by AeroLeads.

outputSchema.description: The normalized AeroLeads LinkedIn profile enrichment result.
